Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major urban area in Nigeria, known for its rapid development and economic growth. It is one of the largest cities in the country and serves as a hub for business, education, and culture. The area is home to several important institutions, including the University of Lagos and the Lekki International Airport. The city has also become a significant center for real estate and investment.
